MSAJCE  Mohamed Sathak A.J. College of Engineering
Dept. of Computer Science and Business Systems (CSBS)  Complete Data
Extract for RAG Model
Source URL: https://www.msajce-edu.in/csbs.php | Sections: 13 sections covered
Scraped: 2026-04-27 | Chunks: 8 | Token Target: 500 | Overlap: 100 | Model: text-embedding-3-small
1. CSBS Department Overview, Key Features & Programme Details
Chunk ID: msajce_csbs_chunk_01 | URL: https://www.msajce-edu.in/csbs.php#tab1 | ~440 tokens
Context: CSBS overview, TCS industry collaboration, key features, programme details, seats, eligibility and benefits over CSE.
B.Tech in Computer Science and Business Systems (CSBS) is a specialized undergraduate engineering program designed to
blend core computer science education with insights into business systems and management. Introduced in collaboration with
Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) to bridge the gap between traditional computer science education and the dynamic needs of
the IT and business world in the era of Business 4.0.
Curriculum covers: Analytics, Deep Learning, Machine Learning, Cloud Computing, Business Analytics, Financial Management,
Economics, Internet of Things, Design Thinking, humanities and value-added science.
Key Features:
(cid:127) Balanced Curriculum  Core CS (Data Structures, Algorithms, OS, DBMS, AI/ML) + Business subjects (Economics, Financial
Management, Business Process Management).
(cid:127) Industry Collaboration  Designed in partnership with TCS; emphasis on employability and industry readiness.
(cid:127) Focus Areas  Problem-solving using computational thinking, Business analytics, IT systems for business applications.
(cid:127) Soft Skills Training  Communication, Teamwork, Entrepreneurial thinking.
Benefits Over Regular CSE: More interdisciplinary exposure; better suited for tech-enabled business functions; greater
alignment with industry expectations in IT services and consulting.
Detail Value
Programme B.Tech. Computer Science and Business Systems (CSBS)
Industry Partner Tata Consultancy Services (TCS)
Duration 4 years (Regular) / 3 years (Lateral Entry)
Semesters 8 (Regular) / 6 (Lateral Entry)
Total Seats 30
Govt. Quota 15
Mgmt. Quota 15
Eligibility 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics
Curriculum 2021 Regulation  https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/academics/2021Regulation.pdf
Higher Studies M.E. / M.Tech. / M.B.A.
Top Recruiters TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, CTS, FSS
